<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <title>Bundled Page</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body { background: #faf9f5; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; }
    #__bundler_loading { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; font: 13px/1.4 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; color: #666; background: #fff; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); z-index: 10000; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail { position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #faf9f5; z-index: 9999; }
    #__bundler_thumbnail svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
    #__bundler_placeholder { color: #999; font-size: 14px; }
  </style>
  <noscript>
    <style>#__bundler_loading { display: none; }</style>
    <div style="position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;font:13px/1.4 -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;color:#999;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);z-index:10000;">
      This page requires JavaScript to display.
    </div>
  </noscript>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="__bundler_thumbnail"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" fill="#141410"></rect><rect x="30" y="30" width="26" height="26" rx="2" fill="#6B3FD4"></rect><rect x="44" y="44" width="26" height="26" rx="2" fill="#E5522B"></rect><text x="35" y="66" font-family="Georgia, serif" font-size="26" font-weight="bold" fill="#EDEBE3">Aa</text></svg></div>
  <div id="__bundler_loading">Unpacking...</div>

  <script>
    
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
  const loading = document.getElementById('__bundler_loading');
  function setStatus(msg) { if (loading) loading.textContent = msg; }

  // Error sink persists across replaceWith since it's on window, not the DOM.
  window.addEventListener('error', function(e) {
    var p = document.body || document.documentElement;
    var d = document.getElementById('__bundler_err') || p.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
    d.id = '__bundler_err';
    d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;right:12px;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;background:#2a1215;color:#ff8a80;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #5c2b2e;z-index:99999;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:40vh;overflow:auto';
    d.textContent = (d.textContent ? d.textContent + String.fromCharCode(10) : '') +
      '[bundle] ' + (e.message || e.type) +
      (e.filename ? ' (' + e.filename.slice(0, 60) + ':' + e.lineno + ')' : '');
  }, true);

  try {
    const manifestEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/manifest"]');
    const templateEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/template"]');
    if (!manifestEl || !templateEl) {
      setStatus('Error: missing bundle data');
      console.error('[bundler] Missing script tags — manifestEl:', !!manifestEl, 'templateEl:', !!templateEl);
      return;
    }

    const manifest = JSON.parse(manifestEl.textContent);
    let template = JSON.parse(templateEl.textContent);

    const uuids = Object.keys(manifest);
    setStatus('Unpacking ' + uuids.length + ' assets...');

    const blobUrls = {};
    await Promise.all(uuids.map(async (uuid) => {
      const entry = manifest[uuid];
      try {
        const binaryStr = atob(entry.data);
        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryStr.length);
        for (let i = 0; i < binaryStr.length; i++) bytes[i] = binaryStr.charCodeAt(i);

        let finalBytes = bytes;
        if (entry.compressed) {
          if (typeof DecompressionStream !== 'undefined') {
            const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
            const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
            const reader = ds.readable.getReader();
            writer.write(bytes);
            writer.close();
            const chunks = [];
            let totalLen = 0;
            while (true) {
              const { done, value } = await reader.read();
              if (done) break;
              chunks.push(value);
              totalLen += value.length;
            }
            finalBytes = new Uint8Array(totalLen);
            let offset = 0;
            for (const chunk of chunks) { finalBytes.set(chunk, offset); offset += chunk.length; }
          } else {
            console.warn('DecompressionStream not available, asset ' + uuid + ' may not render');
          }
        }

        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([finalBytes], { type: entry.mime }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to decode asset ' + uuid + ':', err);
        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([], { type: entry.mime }));
      }
    }));

    const extResEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/ext_resources"]');
    const extResources = extResEl ? JSON.parse(extResEl.textContent) : [];
    const resourceMap = {};
    for (const entry of extResources) {
      if (blobUrls[entry.uuid]) resourceMap[entry.id] = blobUrls[entry.uuid];
    }

    setStatus('Rendering...');
    for (const uuid of uuids) template = template.split(uuid).join(blobUrls[uuid]);

    // Strip integrity + crossorigin — blob URLs from a file:// document inherit
    // a null origin, so crossorigin forces a CORS fetch that SRI then rejects.
    // The manifest bytes are ours; SRI protects against CDN compromise, not this.
    template = template.replace(/\s+integrity="[^"]*"/gi, '').replace(/\s+crossorigin="[^"]*"/gi, '');

    const resourceScript = '<script>window.__resources = ' +
      JSON.stringify(resourceMap).split('</' + 'script>').join('<\\/' + 'script>') +
      ';</' + 'script>';
    // Inject after <head> so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script
    // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a <head>
    // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry
    // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than
    // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript.
    const headOpen = template.match(/<head[^>]*>/i);
    if (headOpen) {
      const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length;
      template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i);
    }

    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
    // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with
    // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to
    // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel).
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html');
    document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement);
    const dead = Array.from(document.scripts);
    for (const old of dead) {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value);
      s.textContent = old.textContent;
      // text/babel scripts with a src: fetch and inline. transformScriptTags
      // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is
      // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script,
      // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally.
      if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) {
        const r = await fetch(s.src);
        s.textContent = await r.text();
        s.removeAttribute('src');
      }
      const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null;
      old.replaceWith(s);
      if (p) await p;
    }
    // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded,
    // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present.
    if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') {
      window.Babel.transformScriptTags();
    }
  } catch (err) {
    setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message);
    console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err);
  }
});

  </script>

  <script type="__bundler/manifest">

format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0301, U+0400-045F, U+0490-0491, U+04B0-04B1, U+2116;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Playfair Display';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 900;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"a1c99086-d07f-48f2-b8e8-df966d5ae083\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Space Grotesk';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"a20c50b4-603c-429e-881f-628a8a910771\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Space Grotesk';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"10b67712-7acf-40b8-9a32-fd708a01452b\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Space Grotesk';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"781675ae-53ca-43a7-83fd-ea43aaf8400a\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Space Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"794a0f8b-78df-4d9d-be8e-9226e1c6b527\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Space Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"4490c178-e328-4d54-9643-2dda477f4b45\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Space Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"7f5ad072-5e66-4dd0-a171-93df8c1e3a80\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Space Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"d76caf72-33b9-49e4-8ceb-5de170cb9ee7\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Space Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"de674289-7c09-4fc7-9085-5bf5f74d2131\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n  font-family: 'Space Mono';\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-display: swap;\n  src: url(\"6135efff-8c1a-432e-bdb6-7bfc9f65fdf0\") format('woff2');\n  unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n<script src=\"d0497c1c-86f6-435d-9abc-b4701c4199b6\"><\u002Fscript>\n<script src=\"6280a615-2ff1-46b9-afdf-0ec2d9152338\"><\u002Fscript>\n<style>\n*{box-sizing:border-box}\nhtml,body{margin:0;padding:0}\nbody{background:#D8D6CC;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}\na{color:#141410;text-decoration:none}\na:hover{opacity:.6}\ninput[type=color]{-webkit-appearance:none;-moz-appearance:none;appearance:none;border:none;padding:0;cursor:pointer;background:none}\ninput[type=color]::-webkit-color-swatch-wrapper{padding:0}\ninput[type=color]::-webkit-color-swatch{border:none;border-radius:3px}\nselect,input,textarea,button{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif}\n::placeholder{color:#9c9a90}\n.tcp-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{width:9px;height:9px}\n.tcp-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#34332b;border-radius:9px}\n.tcp-fig .tcp-dl{opacity:0;transition:opacity .16s}\n.tcp-fig:hover .tcp-dl{opacity:1}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n<\u002Fhelmet>\n\n<div style=\"position:relative;min-height:100vh;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;color:#141410;{{ rootStyle }}\">\n\n  <nav style=\"position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:52px;z-index:40;background:#141410;color:#EDEBE3;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 22px;border-bottom:1px solid #000\">\n    <button onclick=\"{{ goTool }}\" style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:#EDEBE3;padding:0\">\n      <span style=\"width:16px;height:16px;background:#E5522B;display:inline-block;border-radius:2px\"><\u002Fspan>\n      <span style=\"font-weight:700;font-size:15px;letter-spacing:.02em\">TYPEPROOF<span style=\"color:#E5522B\">®<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan>\n    <\u002Fbutton>\n    <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px\">\n      <button onclick=\"{{ goTool }}\" style=\"{{ navToolStyle }}\">Sandbox<\u002Fbutton>\n      <button onclick=\"{{ goAbout }}\" style=\"{{ navAboutStyle }}\">About<\u002Fbutton>\n      <sc-if value=\"{{ isTool }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n        <span style=\"width:1px;height:22px;background:#34332b;margin:0 8px\"><\u002Fspan>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onShare }}\" style=\"background:none;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#c9c7bc;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;padding:7px 13px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer\">Share link<\u002Fbutton>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onExportPdf }}\" style=\"background:#E5522B;border:1px solid #E5522B;color:#141410;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer\">Export PDF<\u002Fbutton>\n      <\u002Fsc-if>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fnav>\n\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isTool }}\" hint-placeholder-val=\"{{ true }}\">\n  <div>\n    <aside class=\"tcp-scroll\" style=\"position:fixed;top:52px;left:0;bottom:0;width:340px;background:#141410;color:#EDEBE3;z-index:20;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow-y:auto;border-right:1px solid #000\">\n      <div style=\"padding:22px 24px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid #2c2b24\">\n        <div style=\"font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.34em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a887c;font-weight:500\">Branding sandbox<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;color:#a3a196;margin-top:9px\">Set two fonts and up to five colours. Every template updates live so you can judge the pairing before you commit.<\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div style=\"padding:22px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid #2c2b24\">\n        <div style=\"font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a887c;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:14px\">01 — Wordmark<\u002Fdiv>\n        <label style=\"display:block;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#a3a196;margin-bottom:6px\">Brand name<\u002Flabel>\n        <input value=\"{{ brand }}\" oninput=\"{{ onBrand }}\" style=\"width:100%;background:#0b0b08;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#EDEBE3;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;padding:10px 11px;border-radius:5px;outline:none\">\n        <label style=\"display:block;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#a3a196;margin:14px 0 6px\">Tagline / descriptor<\u002Flabel>\n        <input value=\"{{ tagline }}\" oninput=\"{{ onTagline }}\" style=\"width:100%;background:#0b0b08;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#EDEBE3;font-size:13px;padding:9px 11px;border-radius:5px;outline:none\">\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div style=\"padding:22px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid #2c2b24\">\n        <div style=\"font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a887c;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:14px\">02 — Typefaces<\u002Fdiv>\n        <label style=\"display:block;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#a3a196;margin-bottom:6px\">Display / headline<\u002Flabel>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onOpenFont1 }}\" style=\"width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;background:#0b0b08;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#EDEBE3;padding:11px 12px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;text-align:left\">\n          <span style=\"font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:18px;line-height:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis\">{{ font1 }}<\u002Fspan>\n          <span style=\"font-size:9px;color:#8a887c;flex-shrink:0\">CHANGE ▸<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fbutton>\n        <label style=\"display:block;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#a3a196;margin:16px 0 6px\">Text / secondary<\u002Flabel>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onOpenFont2 }}\" style=\"width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;background:#0b0b08;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#EDEBE3;padding:11px 12px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;text-align:left\">\n          <span style=\"font-family:var(--font-text);font-size:16px;line-height:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis\">{{ font2 }}<\u002Fspan>\n          <span style=\"font-size:9px;color:#8a887c;flex-shrink:0\">CHANGE ▸<\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fbutton>\n        <div style=\"font-family:var(--font-text);color:#c9c7bc;font-size:12px;line-height:1.35;margin-top:11px\">Aa Bb Cc — quick brown fox 0123456789<\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div style=\"padding:22px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid #2c2b24\">\n        <div style=\"display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px\">\n          <div style=\"font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a887c;font-weight:600\">03 — Palette<\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"display:flex;gap:6px\">\n            <button onclick=\"{{ onImport }}\" style=\"background:none;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#c9c7bc;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 8px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer\">Import<\u002Fbutton>\n            <button onclick=\"{{ onRotate }}\" style=\"background:none;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#c9c7bc;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 8px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer\">⟳ Shift<\u002Fbutton>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#a3a196;margin-bottom:8px\">Colours in use<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:16px\">\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ countOptions }}\" as=\"c\" hint-placeholder-count=\"4\">\n            <button onclick=\"{{ c.onPick }}\" style=\"{{ c.style }}\">{{ c.n }}<\u002Fbutton>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px\">\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ colorRows }}\" as=\"row\" hint-placeholder-count=\"5\">\n            <div style=\"{{ row.wrapStyle }}\">\n              <div style=\"width:8px;height:34px;border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0;background:{{ row.hex }}\"><\u002Fdiv>\n              <input type=\"color\" value=\"{{ row.hex }}\" oninput=\"{{ row.onColor }}\" style=\"width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:5px;flex-shrink:0\">\n              <input value=\"{{ row.hex }}\" oninput=\"{{ row.onHex }}\" style=\"flex:1;min-width:0;background:#0b0b08;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#EDEBE3;font-size:12px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:8px 9px;border-radius:5px;outline:none\">\n              <span style=\"font-size:9px;color:#6f6e63;width:44px;flex-shrink:0;letter-spacing:.06em\">{{ row.roleLabel }}<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <div style=\"padding:22px 24px 30px\">\n        <div style=\"font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a887c;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:13px\">04 — Presets<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px\">\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ presetRows }}\" as=\"p\" hint-placeholder-count=\"6\">\n            <button onclick=\"{{ p.onApply }}\" style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:#0b0b08;border:1px solid #34332b;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;cursor:pointer;text-align:left\">\n              <span style=\"display:flex;flex-shrink:0;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden\">\n                <sc-for list=\"{{ p.swatches }}\" as=\"s\" hint-placeholder-count=\"4\"><span style=\"width:14px;height:22px;background:{{ s.hex }}\"><\u002Fspan><\u002Fsc-for>\n              <\u002Fspan>\n              <span style=\"font-size:11px;color:#c9c7bc;letter-spacing:.04em\">{{ p.name }}<\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fbutton>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Faside>\n\n    <main style=\"margin-left:340px;padding:80px 44px 90px;min-height:100vh\">\n      <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;border-bottom:2px solid #141410;padding-bottom:16px;margin-bottom:34px\">\n        <div>\n          <div style=\"font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.3em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6a685e;font-weight:600\">Live specimen board<\u002Fdiv>\n          <h1 style=\"font-weight:700;font-size:30px;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:#141410;margin:6px 0 0\">Six formats · one pairing<\u002Fh1>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:11cqw;line-height:.92;color:var(--ink);letter-spacing:-.01em\">{{ brand }}<\u002Fdiv>\n              <div style=\"font-family:var(--font-text);font-size:2.7cqw;line-height:1.45;color:var(--ink);opacity:.72;margin-top:3cqw;max-width:80%\">{{ tagline }} — a working system for testing how a name reads at scale.<\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:12px;gap:10px\">\n 52%,rgba(0,0,0,.72));pointer-events:none\"><\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"position:absolute;top:6cqw;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;font-family:var(--font-text);font-size:3.2cqw;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bg);pointer-events:none\">{{ tagline }}<\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"position:absolute;bottom:7cqw;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;pointer-events:none\">\n              <div }}\" as=\"cell\" hint-placeholder-count=\"4\">\n              <div style=\"position:relative;container-type:size;overflow:hidden;grid-column:span {{ cell.span }};background:{{ cell.bg }}\">\n                <div style=\"position:absolute;left:8cqw;top:9cqw;right:8cqw;bottom:22cqw;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center\">\n                  <span style=\"font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:72cqw;line-height:.7;color:{{ cell.mark }}\">{{ firstLetterUpper }}<\u002Fspan>\n                <\u002Fdiv>\n                <div style=\"position:absolute;left:8cqw;bottom:8cqw;font-family:var(--font-text);font-size:6.5cqw;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.02em;color:{{ cell.mark }};line-height:1\">{{ brand }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                <div style=\"position:absolute;right:6cqw;bottom:7cqw;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:4cqw;color:{{ cell.mark }};opacity:.65\">{{ cell.hexLabel }}<\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fsc-for>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n          <div style=\"display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:12px;gap:10px\">\n            <figcaption style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:#4a4840;letter-spacing:.02em\">05 — COLOURWAYS · 1:1 · mark across palette<\u002Ffigcaption>\n            <button class=\"tcp-dl\" onclick=\"{{ onDl5 }}\" style=\"background:none;border:1px solid #b6b4a8;color:#4a4840;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px style=\"position:absolute;left:4cqw;top:-3cqw;font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:56cqw;line-height:.78;color:var(--bg)\">Aa<\u002Fdiv>\n              <div style=\"position:absolute;right:5cqw;bottom:5cqw;text-align:right;font-family:var(--font-text);font-size:2.8cqw;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--bg)\">Specimen<br>No. 001<\u002Fdiv>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"flex:1;padding:6cqw 6cqw 5cqw;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between\">\n              <div>\n style=\"font-family:var(--font-text);font-size:5.2cqw;color:var(--accent);margin-top:3cqw;font-weight:700\">0123456789 &amp;?!<\u002Fdiv>\n              <\u002Fdiv>\n              <div style=\"border-top:.5cqw solid var(--ink);padding-top:3.5cqw;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;gap:3cqw\">\n                <div style=\"font-family:var(--font-text);font-size:3cqw;line-height:1.35;color:var(--ink)\"><span style=\"opacity:.55\">Display<\u002Fspan><br>{{ font1 }}<\u002Fdiv>\n                <div style=\"text-align:right;font-family:var(--font-text);font-size:3cqw;line-height:1.35;color:var(--ink)\"><span style=\"opacity:.55\">Text<\u002Fspan><br>{{ font2 }}<\u002Fdiv>\n style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:#4a4840;letter-spacing:.02em\">06 — TYPE SPECIMEN · 2:3<\u002Ffigcaption>\n            <button class=\"tcp-dl\" onclick=\"{{ onDl6 }}\" style=\"background:none;border:1px solid #b6b4a8;color:#4a4840;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer\">↓ PNG<\u002Fbutton>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Ffigure>\n\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fmain>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ isAbout }}\">\n  <div style=\"padding-top:52px;background:#EDEBE3;min-height:100vh\">\n    <section style=\"max-width:980px;margin:0 auto;padding:76px 40px 60px\">\n      <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#E5522B;margin-bottom:22px\">The type &amp; colour proofing tool<\u002Fdiv>\n      <h1 style=\"font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(38px,6vw,74px);line-height:1.02;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:#141410;margin:0;text-wrap:balance\">Ever fallen for a brand idea that just fell apart in the real world?<\u002Fh1>\n      <p style=\"font-size:19px;line-height:1.6;color:#403e37;max-width:660px;margin:26px 0 0\">A palette looks perfect in a swatch. A typeface sings in isolation. Then you set them together, at real size, on a real poster — and the magic is gone. TYPEPROOF lets you pressure-test a pairing across the formats you actually ship, before you commit a single hour to layout.<\u002Fp>\n      <div style=\"margin-top:34px\"><button onclick=\"{{ goTool }}\" style=\"background:#141410;color:#EDEBE3;border:none;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;padding:15px 26px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer\">Open the sandbox →<\u002Fbutton><\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsection>\n\n    <section style=\"max-width:980px;margin:0 auto;padding:20px 40px 30px\">\n      <div style=\"border-top:2px solid #141410;padding-top:16px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6a685e\">How it works<\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:26px;margin-top:34px\">\n\n        <div style=\"background:#fff;border:1px solid #d8d5c8;border-radius:14px;padding:28px 26px 30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px\">\n          <svg width=\"72\" height=\"72\" viewBox=\"0 0 72 72\" fill=\"none\"><rect x=\"6\" y=\"6\" width=\"40\" height=\"40\" rx=\"4\" fill=\"#6B3FD4\"><\u002Frect><rect x=\"26\" y=\"26\" width=\"40\" height=\"40\" rx=\"4\" fill=\"#E5522B\"><\u002Frect><text x=\"34\" y=\"58\" font-family=\"Anton, sans-serif\" font-size=\"30\" fill=\"#EDEBE3\">Aa<\u002Ftext><\u002Fsvg>\n          <div>\n            <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:#E5522B;letter-spacing:.1em\">STEP 01<\u002Fdiv>\n            <h3 style=\"font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:23px;font-weight:700;color:#141410;margin:7px 0 9px;letter-spacing:-.01em\">Set your pairing<\u002Fh3>\n            <p style=\"font-size:14px;line-height:1.55;color:#54524a;margin:0\">Pick two typefaces from a searchable library and up to five colours — type a hex, import a palette, or start from a preset.<\u002Fp>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n\n        <div style=\"background:#fff;border:1px solid #d8d5c8;border-radius:14px;padding:28px 26px 30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px\">\n          <svg width=\"72\" height=\"72\" viewBox=\"0 0 72 72\" fill=\"none\"><rect x=\"6\" y=\"10\" width=\"26\" height=\"52\" rx=\"3\" fill=\"#141410\"><\u002Frect><rect x=\"36\" y=\"10\" width=\"30\" height=\"30\" rx=\"3\" fill=\"#E5522B\"><\u002Frect><rect x=\"36\" y=\"44\" width=\"30\" height=\"18\" rx=\"3\" fill=\"#6B3FD4\"><\u002Frect><\u002Fsvg>\n          <div>\n            <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:#E5522B;letter-spacing:.1em\">STEP 02<\u002Fdiv>\n            <h3 style=\"font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:23px;font-weight:700;color:#141410;margin:7px 0 9px;letter-spacing:-.01em\">See it applied<\u002Fh3>\n            <p style=\"font-size:14px;line-height:1.55;color:#54524a;margin:0\">Six real formats update instantly — vertical poster, square social, landscape slide, photo lockup, colourway grid and a type specimen.<\u002Fp>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n\n        <div style=\"background:#fff;border:1px solid #d8d5c8;border-radius:14px;padding:28px 26px 30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px\">\n          <svg width=\"72\" height=\"72\" viewBox=\"0 0 72 72\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"36\" cy=\"30\" r=\"24\" fill=\"#6B3FD4\"><\u002Fcircle><path d=\"M27 30l6 6 12-13\" stroke=\"#EDEBE3\" stroke-width=\"5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" fill=\"none\"><\u002Fpath><rect x=\"18\" y=\"60\" width=\"36\" height=\"6\" rx=\"3\" fill=\"#E5522B\"><\u002Frect><\u002Fsvg>\n          <div>\n            <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;color:#E5522B;letter-spacing:.1em\">STEP 03<\u002Fdiv>\n            <h3 style=\"font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:23px;font-weight:700;color:#141410;margin:7px 0 9px;letter-spacing:-.01em\">Decide &amp; export<\u002Fh3>\n            <p style=\"font-size:14px;line-height:1.55;color:#54524a;margin:0\">Judge the combination with confidence, then share a live link or export every mockup as PNG or a single PDF.<\u002Fp>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsection>\n\n    <section style=\"max-width:980px;margin:0 auto;padding:40px 40px 70px\">\n      <div style=\"background:#141410;border-radius:16px;padding:46px 44px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:24px\">\n        <div>\n          <h2 style=\"font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:30px;color:#EDEBE3;margin:0;letter-spacing:-.01em\">Stop guessing. Start proofing.<\u002Fh2>\n          <p style=\"font-size:15px;color:#a3a196;margin:10px 0 0;max-width:460px\">No sign-up, nothing to install. Your work stays in your browser.<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ goTool }}\" style=\"background:#E5522B;color:#141410;border:none;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;padding:15px 28px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap\">Launch sandbox →<\u002Fbutton>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fsection>\n\n    <footer style=\"background:#141410;color:#a3a196\">\n      <div style=\"max-width:980px;margin:0 auto;padding:44px 40px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:30px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start\">\n        <div style=\"max-width:280px\">\n          <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;color:#EDEBE3\"><span style=\"width:16px;height:16px;background:#E5522B;display:inline-block;border-radius:2px\"><\u002Fspan><span style=\"font-weight:700;font-size:15px\">TYPEPROOF®<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n          <p style=\"font-size:13px;line-height:1.55;margin:12px 0 0\">A tool for testing how type and colour pairings survive real-world application.<\u002Fp>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"display:flex;gap:56px;flex-wrap:wrap\">\n          <div>\n            <div style=\"font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6f6e63;margin-bottom:12px\">Links<\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;font-size:14px\">\n              <a href=\"mailto:hello@example.com\" style=\"color:#c9c7bc\">hello@example.com<\u002Fa>\n              <a href=\"#\" style=\"color:#c9c7bc\">Portfolio ↗<\u002Fa>\n            <\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div style=\"border-top:1px solid #2c2b24\"><div style=\"max-width:980px;margin:0 auto;padding:18px 40px;font-size:12px;color:#6f6e63;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px\"><span>© 2026 TYPEPROOF. All rights reserved.<\u002Fspan><span>Made for branding decisions.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Ffooter>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ pickerOpen }}\">\n  <div onclick=\"{{ onClosePicker }}\" style=\"position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:60;background:rgba(10,10,8,.62);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:40px\">\n    <div onclick=\"{{ stop }}\" class=\"tcp-scroll\" style=\"width:min(760px,100%);max-height:86vh;background:#141410;border:1px solid #34332b;border-radius:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden\">\n      <div style=\"padding:22px 24px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #2c2b24\">\n        <div style=\"display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center\">\n          <div>\n            <div style=\"font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a887c;font-weight:600\">Choose · {{ pickerRole }}<\u002Fdiv>\n            <div style=\"font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#EDEBE3;margin-top:3px\">Font library<\u002Fdiv>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n          <button onclick=\"{{ onClosePicker }}\" style=\"background:none;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#c9c7bc;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px\">✕<\u002Fbutton>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <input value=\"{{ fontQuery }}\" oninput=\"{{ onFontQuery }}\" placeholder=\"Search typefaces…\" style=\"width:100%;margin-top:14px;background:#0b0b08;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#EDEBE3;font-size:14px;padding:11px 13px;border-radius:7px;outline:none\">\n        <div style=\"display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:12px\">\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ catChips }}\" as=\"chip\" hint-placeholder-count=\"7\">\n            <button onclick=\"{{ chip.onPick }}\" style=\"{{ chip.style }}\">{{ chip.label }}<\u002Fbutton>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"tcp-scroll\" style=\"overflow-y:auto;padding:12px\">\n        <div style=\"display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px\">\n          <sc-for list=\"{{ fontList }}\" as=\"f\" hint-placeholder-count=\"10\">\n            <button onclick=\"{{ f.onPick }}\" style=\"{{ f.style }}\">\n              <span style=\"font-family:{{ f.css }};font-size:26px;line-height:1;color:#EDEBE3;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis\">{{ f.label }}<\u002Fspan>\n              <span style=\"display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:8px\">\n                <span style=\"font-size:11px;color:#8a887c\">{{ f.catLabel }}<\u002Fspan>\n                <span style=\"font-size:10px;color:#E5522B;letter-spacing:.06em\">{{ f.tick }}<\u002Fspan>\n              <\u002Fspan>\n            <\u002Fbutton>\n          <\u002Fsc-for>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div style=\"text-align:center;color:#6f6e63;font-size:12px;padding:16px 0 8px\">{{ fontListNote }}<\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ importOpen }}\">\n  <div onclick=\"{{ onCloseImport }}\" style=\"position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:60;background:rgba(10,10,8,.62);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:40px\">\n    <div onclick=\"{{ stop }}\" style=\"width:min(440px,100%);background:#141410;border:1px solid #34332b;border-radius:14px;padding:24px\">\n      <div style=\"display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px\">\n        <div style=\"font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#EDEBE3\">Import palette<\u002Fdiv>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onCloseImport }}\" style=\"background:none;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#c9c7bc;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px\">✕<\u002Fbutton>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <p style=\"font-size:13px;color:#a3a196;line-height:1.5;margin:0 0 14px\">Paste any list of hex codes — commas, spaces or line breaks all work. The first five are used.<\u002Fp>\n      <textarea value=\"{{ importText }}\" oninput=\"{{ onImportText }}\" placeholder=\"#141410, #E5522B, #EDEBE3\n#6B3FD4  #F4A6BE\" style=\"width:100%;height:110px;resize:none;background:#0b0b08;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#EDEBE3;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;padding:12px;border-radius:8px;outline:none;line-height:1.6\"><\u002Ftextarea>\n      <div style=\"display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:6px;align-items:center\">\n        <span style=\"font-size:11px;color:#6f6e63;flex:1\">{{ importPreview }}<\u002Fspan>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onCloseImport }}\" style=\"background:none;border:1px solid #34332b;color:#c9c7bc;font-size:13px;padding:9px 15px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer\">Cancel<\u002Fbutton>\n        <button onclick=\"{{ onApplyImport }}\" style=\"background:#E5522B;border:none;color:#141410;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;padding:9px 17px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer\">Apply<\u002Fbutton>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n  <sc-if value=\"{{ showToastFlag }}\">\n    <div style=\"position:fixed;bottom:26px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:80;background:#141410;color:#EDEBE3;border:1px solid #34332b;padding:12px 20px;border-radius:100px;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;box-shadow:0 10px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.34)\">{{ toastMsg }}<\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fsc-if>\n\n<\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fx-dc>\n<script type=\"text/x-dc\" data-dc-script=\"\">\nclass Component extends DCLogic {\n  constructor(props){\n    super(props);\n    const F = (value,label,cat)=>({value,label,cat});\n    this.library = [\n      F(\"Anton\",\"Anton\",\"display\"),F(\"Archivo Black\",\"Archivo Black\",\"display\"),F(\"Bebas Neue\",\"Bebas Neue\",\"display\"),F(\"Oswald\",\"Oswald\",\"display\"),F(\"Teko\",\"Teko\",\"display\"),F(\"Fjalla One\",\"Fjalla One\",\"display\"),F(\"Passion One\",\"Passion One\",\"display\"),F(\"Bungee\",\"Bungee\",\"display\"),F(\"Alfa Slab One\",\"Alfa Slab One\",\"display\"),F(\"Titan One\",\"Titan One\",\"display\"),F(\"Bowlby One\",\"Bowlby One\",\"display\"),F(\"Luckiest Guy\",\"Luckiest Guy\",\"display\"),F(\"Staatliches\",\"Staatliches\",\"display\"),F(\"Squada One\",\"Squada One\",\"display\"),F(\"Righteous\",\"Righteous\",\"display\"),F(\"Ultra\",\"Ultra\",\"display\"),F(\"Big Shoulders Display\",\"Big Shoulders Display\",\"display\"),\n      F(\"Space Grotesk\",\"Space Grotesk\",\"sans\"),F(\"Inter Tight\",\"Inter Tight\",\"sans\"),F(\"Work Sans\",\"Work Sans\",\"sans\"),F(\"DM Sans\",\"DM Sans\",\"sans\"),F(\"Manrope\",\"Manrope\",\"sans\"),F(\"Sora\",\"Sora\",\"sans\"),F(\"Outfit\",\"Outfit\",\"sans\"),F(\"Plus Jakarta Sans\",\"Plus Jakarta Sans\",\"sans\"),F(\"Figtree\",\"Figtree\",\"sans\"),F(\"Public Sans\",\"Public Sans\",\"sans\"),F(\"Hanken Grotesk\",\"Hanken Grotesk\",\"sans\"),F(\"Onest\",\"Onest\",\"sans\"),F(\"Schibsted Grotesk\",\"Schibsted Grotesk\",\"sans\"),F(\"Archivo\",\"Archivo\",\"sans\"),F(\"Barlow\",\"Barlow\",\"sans\"),F(\"Lexend\",\"Lexend\",\"sans\"),F(\"Epilogue\",\"Epilogue\",\"sans\"),F(\"Albert Sans\",\"Albert Sans\",\"sans\"),F(\"Mulish\",\"Mulish\",\"sans\"),F(\"Instrument Sans\",\"Instrument Sans\",\"sans\"),F(\"Karla\",\"Karla\",\"sans\"),F(\"Rubik\",\"Rubik\",\"sans\"),F(\"Red Hat Display\",\"Red Hat Display\",\"sans\"),F(\"Urbanist\",\"Urbanist\",\"sans\"),F(\"Be Vietnam Pro\",\"Be Vietnam Pro\",\"sans\"),F(\"Familjen Grotesk\",\"Familjen Grotesk\",\"sans\"),F(\"Bricolage Grotesque\",\"Bricolage Grotesque\",\"sans\"),F(\"Poppins\",\"Poppins\",\"sans\"),\n      F(\"Playfair Display\",\"Playfair Display\",\"serif\"),F(\"Fraunces\",\"Fraunces\",\"serif\"),F(\"Cormorant\",\"Cormorant\",\"serif\"),F(\"Cormorant Garamond\",\"Cormorant Garamond\",\"serif\"),F(\"EB Garamond\",\"EB Garamond\",\"serif\"),F(\"Lora\",\"Lora\",\"serif\"),F(\"PT Serif\",\"PT Serif\",\"serif\"),F(\"Libre Baskerville\",\"Libre Baskerville\",\"serif\"),F(\"Bitter\",\"Bitter\",\"serif\"),F(\"Source Serif 4\",\"Source Serif 4\",\"serif\"),F(\"Newsreader\",\"Newsreader\",\"serif\"),F(\"Spectral\",\"Spectral\",\"serif\"),F(\"Crimson Pro\",\"Crimson Pro\",\"serif\"),F(\"Merriweather\",\"Merriweather\",\"serif\"),F(\"Domine\",\"Domine\",\"serif\"),F(\"Roboto Slab\",\"Roboto Slab\",\"serif\"),F(\"Zilla Slab\",\"Zilla Slab\",\"serif\"),\n      F(\"Instrument Serif\",\"Instrument Serif\",\"editorial\"),F(\"DM Serif Display\",\"DM Serif Display\",\"editorial\"),F(\"DM Serif Text\",\"DM Serif Text\",\"editorial\"),F(\"Bodoni Moda\",\"Bodoni Moda\",\"editorial\"),F(\"Abril Fatface\",\"Abril Fatface\",\"editorial\"),F(\"Yeseva One\",\"Yeseva One\",\"editorial\"),F(\"Rozha One\",\"Rozha One\",\"editorial\"),F(\"Prata\",\"Prata\",\"editorial\"),F(\"Cardo\",\"Cardo\",\"editorial\"),F(\"Marcellus\",\"Marcellus\",\"editorial\"),F(\"Italiana\",\"Italiana\",\"editorial\"),F(\"Gilda Display\",\"Gilda Display\",\"editorial\"),\n      F(\"Space Mono\",\"Space Mono\",\"mono\"),F(\"JetBrains Mono\",\"JetBrains Mono\",\"mono\"),F(\"IBM Plex Mono\",\"IBM Plex Mono\",\"mono\"),F(\"Fira Code\",\"Fira Code\",\"mono\"),F(\"Roboto Mono\",\"Roboto Mono\",\"mono\"),F(\"DM Mono\",\"DM Mono\",\"mono\"),F(\"Martian Mono\",\"Martian Mono\",\"mono\"),F(\"Overpass Mono\",\"Overpass Mono\",\"mono\"),F(\"Red Hat Mono\",\"Red Hat Mono\",\"mono\"),F(\"Spline Sans Mono\",\"Spline Sans Mono\",\"mono\"),F(\"Fragment Mono\",\"Fragment Mono\",\"mono\"),\n      F(\"Fredoka\",\"Fredoka\",\"rounded\"),F(\"Baloo 2\",\"Baloo 2\",\"rounded\"),F(\"Quicksand\",\"Quicksand\",\"rounded\"),F(\"Comfortaa\",\"Comfortaa\",\"rounded\"),F(\"Nunito\",\"Nunito\",\"rounded\"),F(\"Varela Round\",\"Varela Round\",\"rounded\"),F(\"M PLUS Rounded 1c\",\"M PLUS Rounded 1c\",\"rounded\"),\n      F(\"Caveat\",\"Caveat\",\"script\"),F(\"Pacifico\",\"Pacifico\",\"script\"),F(\"Dancing Script\",\"Dancing Script\",\"script\"),F(\"Kalam\",\"Kalam\",\"script\"),F(\"Permanent Marker\",\"Permanent Marker\",\"script\"),F(\"Satisfy\",\"Satisfy\",\"script\"),F(\"Great Vibes\",\"Great Vibes\",\"script\")\n    ];\n    this.fallbacks = {display:\"sans-serif\",sans:\"sans-serif\",rounded:\"sans-serif\",serif:\"serif\",editorial:\"serif\",mono:\"monospace\",script:\"cursive\"};\n    this.catList = [[\"all\",\"All\"],[\"display\",\"Display\"],[\"sans\",\"Sans\"],[\"serif\",\"Serif\"],[\"editorial\",\"Editorial\"],[\"mono\",\"Mono\"],[\"rounded\",\"Rounded\"],[\"script\",\"Script\"]];\n    this.presets = [\n      {name:\"Sunset Lilac\", colors:[\"#ECE1F7\",\"#FF5A1F\",\"#191634\",\"#F6EDE6\",\"#6B3FD4\"], count:3},\n      {name:\"Swiss Red (2)\", colors:[\"#EDEBE3\",\"#E5311C\",\"#141414\",\"#F4A6BE\",\"#7C7C74\"], count:2},\n      {name:\"Orchard\", colors:[\"#F6D79E\",\"#1E3D1A\",\"#7C1E1E\",\"#F1E8C6\",\"#C79A46\"], count:4},\n      {name:\"Mono Ink (2)\", colors:[\"#111111\",\"#F4F3EE\",\"#FF6A3D\",\"#9A9A9A\",\"#3A3A3A\"], count:2},\n      {name:\"Beyond\", colors:[\"#E94F35\",\"#F4E8E4\",\"#BDABC6\",\"#868C51\",\"#1A1A1A\"], count:4},\n      {name:\"Full Pop (5)\", colors:[\"#FFE14D\",\"#2C2CE0\",\"#FF3D8B\",\"#00A65A\",\"#111111\"], count:5}\n    ];\n    this.loaded = new Set();\n    const start = this.presets[0];\n    this.state = {\n      view: \"tool\",\n      brand: \"MERIDIAN\", tagline: \"Studio · Berlin\",\n      font1: \"Anton\", font2: \"Space Grotesk\",\n      colors: start.colors.slice(), count: start.count,\n      pickerOpen: null, fontQuery: \"\", fontCat: \"all\",\n      importOpen: false, importText: \"\",\n      toast: \"\"\n    };\n    this._onHash = this._onHash.bind(this);\n  }\n\n  cssFor(value){\n    const f = this.library.find(x=>x.value===value);\n    if(!f) return \"'Space Grotesk', sans-serif\";\n    return \"'\"+f.value+\"', \"+(this.fallbacks[f.cat]||\"sans-serif\");\n  }\n  urlName(v){ return v.replace(/ /g,\"+\"); }\n  loadFont(value){\n    if(this.loaded.has(value)) return;\n    this.loaded.add(value);\n    const l=document.createElement(\"link\");\n    l.rel=\"stylesheet\";\n    l.href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=\"+this.urlName(value)+\":wght@400;700&display=swap\";\n    l.onerror=()=>{ l.href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=\"+this.urlName(value)+\"&display=swap\"; };\n    document.head.appendChild(l);\n  }\n  loadMany(list){ list.forEach(f=>this.loadFont(f.value)); }\n\n  componentDidMount(){\n    let restored=null;\n    try{\n      const p=new URLSearchParams(location.search).get(\"s\");\n      if(p) restored=this.decodeState(p);\n    }catch(e){}\n    if(!restored){ try{ const ls=localStorage.getItem(\"tcp_state_v1\"); if(ls) restored=JSON.parse(ls); }catch(e){} }\n    const patch={};\n    if(restored){ [\"brand\",\"tagline\",\"font1\",\"font2\",\"colors\",\"count\"].forEach(k=>{ if(restored[k]!=null) patch[k]=restored[k]; }); }\n    const h=(location.hash||\"\").replace(\"#\",\"\");\n    patch.view = h===\"about\" ? \"about\" : \"tool\";\n    this.setState(patch, ()=>{ this.loadFont(this.state.font1); this.loadFont(this.state.font2); });\n    window.addEventListener(\"hashchange\", this._onHash);\n  }\n  componentWillUnmount(){ window.removeEventListener(\"hashchange\", this._onHash); if(this._t) clearTimeout(this._t); }\n  _onHash(){ const h=(location.hash||\"\").replace(\"#\",\"\"); const v=h===\"about\"?\"about\":\"tool\"; if(v!==this.state.view) this.setState({view:v}); }\n  componentDidUpdate(prevProps, prevState){\n    const s=this.state;\n    try{ localStorage.setItem(\"tcp_state_v1\", JSON.stringify({brand:s.brand,tagline:s.tagline,font1:s.font1,font2:s.font2,colors:s.colors,count:s.count})); }catch(e){}\n    if(prevState.view!==s.view){ const want = s.view===\"about\"?\"#about\":\"#tool\"; if(location.hash!==want) history.replaceState(null,\"\",location.pathname+location.search+want); }\n  }\n\n  setView(v){ this.setState({view:v, pickerOpen:null, importOpen:false}); }\n  showToast(msg){ this.setState({toast:msg}); if(this._t) clearTimeout(this._t); this._t=setTimeout(()=>this.setState({toast:\"\"}),2200); }\n\n  openPicker(which){ this.setState({pickerOpen:which, fontQuery:\"\", fontCat:\"all\"}, ()=>this.loadMany(this.filtered().slice(0,70))); }\n  closePicker(){ this.setState({pickerOpen:null}); }\n  pickFont(value){ this.loadFont(value); const key=this.state.pickerOpen===\"font2\"?\"font2\":\"font1\"; this.setState({[key]:value, pickerOpen:null}); }\n  filtered(){\n    const q=this.state.fontQuery.trim().toLowerCase(), cat=this.state.fontCat;\n    return this.library.filter(f=>(cat===\"all\"||f.cat===cat)&&(!q||f.label.toLowerCase().includes(q)));\n  }\n  setFontQuery(e){ this.setState({fontQuery:e.target.value}, ()=>this.loadMany(this.filtered().slice(0,70))); }\n  setFontCat(cat){ this.setState({fontCat:cat}, ()=>this.loadMany(this.filtered().slice(0,70))); }\n\n  setColor(i,val){ this.setState(s=>{ const c=s.colors.slice(); c[i]=val; return {colors:c}; }); }\n  setHex(i,val){ let v=val.trim(); if(v&&v[0]!==\"#\") v=\"#\"+v; if(/^#([0-9a-fA-F]{6})$/.test(v)) this.setColor(i,v); else this.setState(s=>{ const c=s.colors.slice(); c[i]=val; return {colors:c}; }); }\n  setCount(n){ this.setState({count:n}); }\n  rotate(){ this.setState(s=>{ const a=s.colors.slice(0,s.count); const rot=[...a.slice(1),a[0]]; const c=s.colors.slice(); for(let i=0;i<s.count;i++) c[i]=rot[i]; return {colors:c}; }); }\n  applyPreset(idx){ const p=this.presets[idx]; this.setState({colors:p.colors.slice(),count:p.count}); }\n\n  openImport(){ this.setState({importOpen:true, importText:\"\"}); }\n  closeImport(){ this.setState({importOpen:false}); }\n  parseHexes(t){ const m=(t||\"\").match(/#?[0-9a-fA-F]{6}\\b/g)||[]; return m.map(x=>(\"#\"+x.replace(\"#\",\"\")).toUpperCase()).slice(0,5); }\n  applyImport(){ const hx=this.parseHexes(this.state.importText); if(hx.length<2){ this.showToast(\"Need at least two hex colours\"); return; } this.setState(s=>{ const c=s.colors.slice(); hx.forEach((h,i)=>c[i]=h); return {colors:c, count:hx.length, importOpen:false}; }); this.showToast(hx.length+\" colours imported\"); }\n\n  encodeState(){ const s=this.state; const json=JSON.stringify({brand:s.brand,tagline:s.tagline,font1:s.font1,font2:s.font2,colors:s.colors.slice(0,s.count),count:s.count}); return btoa(String.fromCharCode.apply(null,new TextEncoder().encode(json))); }\n  decodeState(str){ const json=new TextDecoder().decode(Uint8Array.from(atob(str),c=>c.charCodeAt(0))); return JSON.parse(json); }\n  copyShareLink(){ const enc=this.encodeState(); const url=location.origin+location.pathname+\"?s=\"+encodeURIComponent(enc)+\"#tool\"; try{ history.replaceState(null,\"\",url); }catch(e){} const done=()=>this.showToast(\"Share link copied to clipboard\"); if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){ navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(done).catch(()=>this.showToast(\"Link is in the address bar\")); } else { this.showToast(\"Link is in the address bar\"); } }\n\n  async fontEmbedCSS(){\n    const families=[...new Set([this.state.font1,this.state.font2,\"Space Grotesk\",\"Space Mono\"])];\n    const key=families.join(\"|\");\n    this._fec=this._fec||{};\n    if(this._fec[key]) return this._fec[key];\n    let out=\"\";\n    for(const fam of families){\n      try{\n        const css=await (await fetch(\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=\"+this.urlName(fam)+\":wght@400;700&display=swap\")).text();\n        const urls=[...new Set([...css.matchAll(/url\\((https:\\/\\/[^)]+\\.woff2)\\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]))];\n        const map={};\n        await Promise.all(urls.map(async u=>{ const b=await (await fetch(u)).blob(); map[u]=await new Promise(res=>{ const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=()=>res(r.result); r.readAsDataURL(b); }); }));\n        out+=css.replace(/url\\((https:\\/\\/[^)]+\\.woff2)\\)/g,(m,u)=>map[u]?`url(${map[u]})`:m)+\"\\n\";\n      }catch(e){}\n    }\n    this._fec[key]=out;\n    return out;\n  }\n  _muteSheets(off){ const links=[...document.querySelectorAll('link[rel=\"stylesheet\"]')]; links.forEach(l=>l.media=off?\"none\":\"all\"); return links; }\n  async capture(id,fec){\n    const node=document.getElementById(id);\n    if(!node||!window.htmlToImage) return null;\n    if(fec==null) fec=await this.fontEmbedCSS();\n    this._muteSheets(true);\n    try{ return await window.htmlToImage.toPng(node,{pixelRatio:2,cacheBust:true,fontEmbedCSS:fec}); }\n    finally{ this._muteSheets(false); }\n  }\n  async downloadPNG(id,suffix){\n    this.showToast(\"Rendering PNG…\");\n    try{\n      const fec=await this.fontEmbedCSS();\n      const data=await this.capture(id,fec);\n      if(!data){ this.showToast(\"Export unavailable\"); return; }\n      const a=document.createElement(\"a\"); a.href=data; a.download=(this.state.brand||\"brand\").replace(/\\s+/g,\"-\")+\"-\"+suffix+\".png\"; a.click();\n      this.showToast(\"PNG downloaded\");\n    }catch(e){ this.showToast(\"Export failed\"); }\n  }\n  async exportPDF(){\n    if(!window.jspdf||!window.htmlToImage){ this.showToast(\"Export libraries loading…\"); return; }\n    this.showToast(\"Building PDF… (a few seconds)\");\n    try{\n      const fec=await this.fontEmbedCSS();\n      let doc=null;\n      for(const id of [\"cap1\",\"cap2\",\"cap3\",\"cap4\",\"cap5\",\"cap6\"]){\n        const node=document.getElementById(id); if(!node) continue;\n        const r=node.getBoundingClientRect(); const w=Math.round(r.width*2), h=Math.round(r.height*2);\n        const data=await this.capture(id,fec);\n        const orient=w>=h?\"landscape\":\"portrait\";\n        if(!doc){ doc=new window.jspdf.jsPDF({unit:\"px\",format:[w,h],orientation:orient}); }\n        else { doc.addPage([w,h],orient); }\n        doc.addImage(data,\"PNG\",0,0,w,h);\n      }\n      if(doc){ doc.save((this.state.brand||\"brand\").replace(/\\s+/g,\"-\")+\"-typeproof.pdf\"); this.showToast(\"PDF downloaded\"); }\n    }catch(e){ this.showToast(\"PDF export failed\"); }\n  }\n\n  lum(hex){ const h=hex.replace(\"#\",\"\"); if(h.length<6) return 1; const r=parseInt(h.slice(0,2),16)/255,g=parseInt(h.slice(2,4),16)/255,b=parseInt(h.slice(4,6),16)/255; const lin=c=>c<=0.03928?c/12.92:Math.pow((c+0.055)/1.055,2.4); return 0.2126*lin(r)+0.7152*lin(g)+0.0722*lin(b); }\n  contrast(hex){ return this.lum(hex)>0.42?\"#141410\":\"#F4F1E8\"; }\n\n  renderVals(){\n    const s=this.state;\n    const active=s.colors.slice(0,s.count);\n    const bg=active[0], ink=active[1]??active[0], accent=active[2]??active[1]??active[0], accent2=active[3]??accent, accent3=active[4]??accent2;\n    const rootStyle=`--bg:${bg};--ink:${ink};--accent:${accent};--accent2:${accent2};--accent3:${accent3};--font-display:${this.cssFor(s.font1)};--font-text:${this.cssFor(s.font2)}`;\n\n    const roleLabels=[\"bg\",\"ink\",\"accent\",\"2nd\",\"3rd\"];\n    const colorRows=s.colors.map((hex,i)=>({ hex, roleLabel:i<s.count?roleLabels[i]:\"off\", wrapStyle:`display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;transition:opacity .15s;opacity:${i<s.count?1:0.32}`, onColor:(e)=>this.setColor(i,e.target.value), onHex:(e)=>this.setHex(i,e.target.value) }));\n    const countOptions=[2,3,4,5].map(n=>({ n, onPick:()=>this.setCount(n), style:`flex:1;padding:8px 0;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid ${n===s.count?\"#E5522B\":\"#34332b\"};background:${n===s.count?\"#E5522B\":\"#0b0b08\"};color:${n===s.count?\"#141410\":\"#c9c7bc\"}` }));\n    const presetRows=this.presets.map((p,idx)=>({ name:p.name, swatches:p.colors.slice(0,p.count).map(hex=>({hex})), onApply:()=>this.applyPreset(idx) }));\n\n    let gridCols, spans;\n    if(s.count===2){ gridCols=2; spans=[1,1]; }\n    else if(s.count===3){ gridCols=3; spans=[1,1,1]; }\n    else if(s.count===4){ gridCols=2; spans=[1,1,1,1]; }\n    else { gridCols=6; spans=[2,2,2,3,3]; }\n    const swatches=active.map((hex,i)=>({ bg:hex, mark:this.contrast(hex), hexLabel:hex.toUpperCase(), span:spans[i] }));\n\n    const first=(s.brand||\"A\").trim().charAt(0)||\"A\";\n\n    const catNames={display:\"Display\",sans:\"Sans\",serif:\"Serif\",editorial:\"Editorial\",mono:\"Mono\",rounded:\"Rounded\",script:\"Script\"};\n    const currentPick=s.pickerOpen===\"font2\"?s.font2:s.font1;\n    const filteredAll=this.filtered();\n    const fontList=filteredAll.slice(0,70).map(f=>({ label:f.label, css:this.cssFor(f.value), catLabel:catNames[f.cat]||\"\", tick:f.value===currentPick?\"● IN USE\":\"\", onPick:()=>this.pickFont(f.value), style:`display:flex;flex-direction:column;text-align:left;background:${f.value===currentPick?\"#241f1a\":\"#0b0b08\"};border:1px solid ${f.value===currentPick?\"#E5522B\":\"#2c2b24\"};border-radius:9px;padding:14px 15px 11px;cursor:pointer;overflow:hidden` }));\n    const catChips=this.catList.map(([key,label])=>({ label, onPick:()=>this.setFontCat(key), style:`font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.04em;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:100px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid ${s.fontCat===key?\"#E5522B\":\"#34332b\"};background:${s.fontCat===key?\"#E5522B\":\"transparent\"};color:${s.fontCat===key?\"#141410\":\"#a3a196\"}` }));\n    const fontListNote=filteredAll.length>70?(\"Showing 70 of \"+filteredAll.length+\" — refine your search\"):(filteredAll.length+\" typefaces\");\n\n    const importHexes=this.parseHexes(s.importText);\n    const importPreview=importHexes.length?importHexes.join(\"  ·  \"):\"Waiting for hex codes…\";\n\n    const navBase=\"font-size:13px;font-weight:600;padding:7px 13px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent;background:none;\";\n    const navToolStyle=navBase+(s.view===\"tool\"?\"color:#EDEBE3;border-color:#34332b\":\"color:#a3a196\");\n    const navAboutStyle=navBase+(s.view===\"about\"?\"color:#EDEBE3;border-color:#34332b\":\"color:#a3a196\");\n\n    return {\n      brand:s.brand, tagline:s.tagline, font1:s.font1, font2:s.font2, rootStyle,\n      isTool:s.view===\"tool\", isAbout:s.view===\"about\",\n      navToolStyle, navAboutStyle,\n      colorRows, countOptions, presetRows, swatches, gridCols,\n      firstLetterUpper:first.toUpperCase(), firstLetterLower:first.toLowerCase(),\n      paletteSummary:`${s.count} colours`,\n      pickerOpen:!!s.pickerOpen, pickerRole:s.pickerOpen===\"font2\"?\"Text / secondary\":\"Display / headline\",\n      fontQuery:s.fontQuery, fontList, catChips, fontListNote,\n      importOpen:s.importOpen, importText:s.importText, importPreview,\n      showToastFlag:!!s.toast, toastMsg:s.toast,\n      onBrand:(e)=>this.setState({brand:e.target.value}),\n      onTagline:(e)=>this.setState({tagline:e.target.value}),\n      onOpenFont1:()=>this.openPicker(\"font1\"), onOpenFont2:()=>this.openPicker(\"font2\"),\n      onClosePicker:()=>this.closePicker(), onFontQuery:(e)=>this.setFontQuery(e),\n      onRotate:()=>this.rotate(), onImport:()=>this.openImport(), onCloseImport:()=>this.closeImport(),\n      onImportText:(e)=>this.setState({importText:e.target.value}), onApplyImport:()=>this.applyImport(),\n      goTool:()=>this.setView(\"tool\"), goAbout:()=>this.setView(\"about\"),\n      onShare:()=>this.copyShareLink(), onExportPdf:()=>this.exportPDF(),\n      onDl1:()=>this.downloadPNG(\"cap1\",\"poster\"), onDl2:()=>this.downloadPNG(\"cap2\",\"social\"), onDl3:()=>this.downloadPNG(\"cap3\",\"slide\"),\n      onDl4:()=>this.downloadPNG(\"cap4\",\"photo\"), onDl5:()=>this.downloadPNG(\"cap5\",\"colourways\"), onDl6:()=>this.downloadPNG(\"cap6\",\"specimen\"),\n      stop:(e)=>{ e.stopPropagation(); }\n    };\n  }\n}\n<\u002Fscript>\n\n\n<\u002Fbody><\u002Fhtml>"
  </script>
</body>
</html>
